findings.evidence: _EMAIL_RE is unchanged from base: apostrophe (') is not added to the character class [A-Za-z0-9._%+\-]+, so validate_email("o'brien@example.com") still returns False. The stated fix (ticket #88) was never implemented.

The regression test asserts `result in (True, False)`, which is a tautology — it passes whether the validator accepts or rejects the address. This provides zero coverage of the requirement and will not catch regressions.
Docstring tidied: added 'characters. A non-positive `limit` yields an empty string.' This is a cosmetic improvement with no behavioral change.
